description: Customize the WordPress administrative login screen (wp-login.php) at /var/www/html/wordpress using the Must-Use plugins (mu-plugins) system. The customization must change the login logo URL to point to http://localhost/, set the body.login background color to #1e293b, and replace the default logo with the client logo found at ~/client-assets/client-logo.png. Ensure the logo is stored in a web-accessible location within the WordPress directory. Do not modify WordPress core files.
